solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def findComplement(self, num: int) -> int:
        bit_length = num.bit_length()
        mask = (1 << bit_length) - 1
        return num ^ mask
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The solution uses bitwise operations to efficiently compute the complement. It calculates a mask with all 1's of the same bit length as the input number and XORs it with the input to flip the bits. This approach is optimal in both time and space.>
